bibdata.title: The International System of Units
Recommended values of standard frequencies for applications including the practical realization of the metre and secondary representations of the second

Methane (
λ
≈ 3.39 ⁢
µm
ii(lambda) ~~ 3.39 "unitsml(um)") (2003)

Part 2: Methane (
λ
≈ 3.39 ⁢
µm
ii(lambda) ~~ 3.39 "unitsml(um)") (2003)
Part 2.27
Appendix 2
Le système international d’unités
Valeurs recommandées des fréquences étalons destinées à la mise en pratique de la définition du mètre et aux représentations secondaires de la seconde

λ
≈ 3.39 ⁢
µm

organization.name: Bureau International des Poids et Mesures
Bureau International des Poids et Mesures
Bureau International des Poids et Mesures
Bureau International des Poids et Mesures

localized-strings.localized-string: Terms, definitions, symbols and abbreviated terms
No terms and definitions are listed in this document.
For the purposes of this document, the following terms and definitions apply.

The following referenced documents are indispensable for the application of this document. For dated references, only the edition cited applies. For undated references, the latest edition of the referenced document (including any amendments) applies.
There are no normative references in this document.
For the purposes of this document, the terms and definitions given in % apply.
For the purposes of this document, the terms and definitions given in % and the following apply.
Termes, définitions, symboles et termes abrégés
Aucun terme n’est défini dans le présent document.
Pour les besoins du présent document, les termes et définitions suivants s’appliquent.

Les documents suivants cités dans le texte sont indispensables pour l'application de ce document. Pour les références datées, seule l’édition citée s’applique. Pour les références non datées, la dernière édition du document de référence s’applique (y compris les éventuels amendements).
Le présent document ne contient aucune référence normative.
Pour les besoins du présent document, les termes et définitions de % s’appliquent.
Pour les besoins du présent document, les termes et définitions de % ainsi que les suivants, s’appliquent.

clause.p: © Bureau International des Poids et Mesures 2003 all rights reserved

clause.title: Copyright statement
clause.p: This document is distributed under the terms of the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (), which permits unrestricted use, distribution, and reproduction in any medium, provided you give appropriate credit to the original author(s) and the source, provide a link to the Creative Commons license, and indicate if changes were made.

feedback-statement.p:
BIPM
Pavillon de Breteuil
F-92312 Sèvres Cedex
FRANCE

p.strong:
Absorbing molecule
C
H 4
,
F 2 (2)
CH_4, F_2^("(2)")
C
H 4
,
F 2 (2)
CH_4, F_2^("(2)") component, P(7)
ν 3
nu_3
ν 3
nu_3 transition

clause.p:
with a relative standard uncertainty of
3 ×
10
− 12
3 xx 10^(-12)
3 ×
10
− 12
3 xx 10^(-12) apply to the radiation of a He-Ne laser stabilized to the central component, (7-6) transition, of the resolved hyperfine-structure triplet. The values correspond to the mean frequency of the two recoil-split components for molecules which are effectively stationary, i.e. the values are corrected for second-order Doppler shift.

with a relative standard uncertainty of
2.3 ×
10
− 11
2.3 xx 10^(−11)
2.3 ×
10
− 11
2.3 xx 10^(−11) apply to the radiation of a He-Ne laser stabilized to the centre of the unresolved hyperfine-structure of a methane cell, within or external to the laser, held at room temperature and subject to the following conditions:

li.p:
mean one-way intracavity surface power density (i.e., the output power density divided by the transmittance of the output mirror)
≤
10 4
⁢
W
⁢
m
− 2
<= 10^4 "unitsml(W*m^(-2))"
≤
10 4
⁢
W
⁢
m
− 2
<= 10^4 "unitsml(W*m^(-2))";

radius of wavefront curvature
≥ 1 ⁢
m
>= 1 "unitsml(m)"
≥ 1 ⁢
m
>= 1 "unitsml(m)";

inequality of power between counter-propagating waves
≤ 5 %
<= 5 %
≤ 5 %
<= 5 %;
servo-referenced to a detector placed at the output facing the laser tube.

clause.p:
Other available values having uncertainties larger than
200 ⁢
Hz
200 "unitsml(Hz)"
200 ⁢
Hz
200 "unitsml(Hz)" have not been used. The relative standard uncertainty of one measurement was estimated to be
2.9 ×
10
− 12
2.9 xx 10^(−12)
2.9 ×
10
− 12
2.9 xx 10^(−12) using the maximum deviation from the mean and rounded to
3 ×
10
− 12
3 xx 10^(−12)
3 ×
10
− 12
3 xx 10^(−12).

The standard deviation of one determination is
1.7 ⁢
kHz
1.7 "unitsml(kHz)"
1.7 ⁢
kHz
1.7 "unitsml(kHz)". This is equivalent to a relative uncertainty of
1.9 ×
10
− 11
1.9 xx 10^(−11)
1.9 ×
10
− 11
1.9 xx 10^(−11), increased by the CCL to
2.3 ×
10
− 11
2.3 xx 10^(−11)
2.3 ×
10
− 11
2.3 xx 10^(−11) to give an uncertainty of
2 ⁢
kHz
2 "unitsml(kHz)"
2 ⁢
kHz
2 "unitsml(kHz)".

bibitem.formattedref: CCDM/92-8a, LPI, Replies to the Questionnaire of the CCDM-92.
CCDM/92-9a, VNIIFTRI, Concerning He-Ne/CH4 laser absolute frequency.
Kramer G., Lipphardt B., Weiss C. O., Coherent frequency synthesis in the infrared, 1992 IEEE Frequency Control Symposium, May 27-29 1992, Hershey, PA, USA.
CCDM/92-23a, ILP, Replies of the Institute of Laser Physics of the Siberian Branch of the Russian Academy of Science to the BIPM Questionnaire (CCDM/92-1).
Zakhar’yash V. F., Klement’ev V. M., Nikitin M. V., Timchenko B. A., Chebotaev V. P., Absolute measurement of the frequency of the E-Line of methane, Sov. Phys. Tech. Phys., 1983, 28, 1374-1375.

Chebotayev V. P., Klementyev V. M., Nikitin M. V., Timchenko B. A., Zakharyash V. F., Comparison of Frequency Stabilities of the Rb Standard and of the He-Ne/CH4 Laser Stabilized to the E Line in Methane, Appl. Phys. B, 1985, 36, 59-61.

Bagayev S. N., Borisov B. D., Gol’Dort V. G., Gusev A. Yu., Dychkov A. S., Zakhar’yash V. F., Klement’yev V. M., Nikitin M. V., Timchenko B. A., Chebotayev V. P., Yumin V. V., An Optical Standard of Time, Avtometrya, 1983, 3, 37-58.
CCDM/92-4a, NRC, Reponse to Questionnaire CCDM.

Felder R., A Decade of Work on the Determination of the Frequency of
F 2 2
F_2^2
F 2 2
F_2^2 Methane Transition at
λ
≈ 3.39 ⁢
µm
ii(lambda) ~~ 3.39 "unitsml(um)"
λ
≈ 3.39 ⁢
µm
ii(lambda) ~~ 3.39 "unitsml(um)", Rapport BIPM, 1992, 92/8.

Weiss C. O., Kramer G., Lipphardt B., Garcia E., Frequency Measurement of a CH4 Hyperfine Line at
88 ⁢
THz
88 "unitsml(THz)"
88 ⁢
THz
88 "unitsml(THz)"/”Optical Clock”, IEEE J. Quant. Electron., 1988, 24, 1970-1972.
Felder R., Robertsson L., Report on the 1989 PTB Experiment, Rapport BIPM, 1992, 92/7.
CCDM/92-20a, BIPM, Reply to the Questionnaire for the CCDM.
